Class ComplementedBDD

java.lang.Object
org.ants.jndd.bdd.ComplementedBDD
public final class ComplementedBDD extends Object
Minimal complemented-edge BDD manager for NDD edge labels.

This implementation is intentionally small: it supports the subset of Boolean-DD operations needed by the current NDD-SoA code paths and the N-Queens benchmark. Handles use one low-order complement bit for internal nodes, while 0 and 1 remain the constant false/true leaves.
